item.title: Shiffrin aims for Olympic gold in slalom -- and this time, she's the favorite
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin was not expected to medal in Sunday's giant slalom. On Wednesday, she's the front-runner to win gold in slalom.

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: PSG, Liverpool join race for Villa star Rogers
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain and Liverpool have joined the race to sign Aston Villa attacking midfielder Morgan Rogers. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: F1 testing LIVE: Charles Leclerc sets early pace from Lando Norris as crucial final week begins
item.description: Follow live updates and analysis of the second week of Formula 1's preseason test in Bahrain as the 2026 cars take to the track.

item.title: Texas Tech upset by ASU as Toppin exits with injury
item.description: Texas Tech star forward JT Toppin injured his lower right leg while driving to the basket with 6:03 remaining in Tuesday night's upset loss at Arizona...

item.title: MLBPA head Clark resigns after internal probe
item.description: MLBPA executive director Tony Clark resigned Tuesday after an internal investigation revealed an inappropriate relationship with his sister-in-law, wh...
